---
title: "`r params$title`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  aegis_obj: NULL
  title: "AEGIS Deconvolution Audit Report"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8.5,
  fig.height = 5.5,
  dpi = 120
)
x <- params$aegis_obj
stopifnot(inherits(x, "aegis"))
```

# Dataset Overview

- Spots: `r ncol(x$seu)`
- Genes: `r nrow(x$seu)`
- Methods: `r paste(names(x$deconv), collapse = ", ")`

# Method Overview

```{r method-overview}
method_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(x$deconv), function(m) {
  mat <- x$deconv[[m]]
  data.frame(
    method = m,
    n_spots = nrow(mat),
    n_celltypes = ncol(mat),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
knitr::kable(format_report_table(method_tbl))
```

# Basic Audit

```{r basic-audit}
if (is.null(x$audit$basic)) x <- audit_basic(x)
knitr::kable(format_report_table(x$audit$basic$summary_table))
plot_audit(x, type = "dominance", palette = "nature")
```

# Marker Audit

```{r marker-audit}
if (is.null(x$audit$marker)) x <- audit_marker(x)
if (!is.null(x$audit$marker$summary_table) && nrow(x$audit$marker$summary_table) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(format_report_table(x$audit$marker$summary_table))
}
if (!is.null(x$audit$marker$concordance) && nrow(x$audit$marker$concordance) > 0) {
  plot_audit(x, type = "marker", palette = "scico")
} else {
  cat("Marker concordance is unavailable for this object.")
}
```

# Spatial Audit

```{r spatial-audit}
if (is.null(x$audit$spatial)) x <- audit_spatial(x)
knitr::kable(format_report_table(x$audit$spatial$summary))
plot_audit(x, type = "smoothness", palette = "viridis")
```

# Method Comparison

```{r method-comparison}
if (is.null(x$consensus$comparison)) x <- compare_methods(x)
knitr::kable(format_report_table(x$consensus$comparison$pairwise_summary))
plot_compare(x, type = "heatmap", palette = "nature")
```

# Method Scoring and Ranking

```{r method-ranking}
if (is.null(x$consensus$method_evidence)) x <- score_methods(x)
if (is.null(x$consensus$method_ranking)) x <- rank_methods(x, method = "mean_rank")
rank_tbl <- x$consensus$method_ranking
if (is.list(rank_tbl)) {
  if (!is.null(rank_tbl$summary) && is.data.frame(rank_tbl$summary) && nrow(rank_tbl$summary) > 0) {
    rank_tbl <- rank_tbl$summary
  } else {
    rank_tbl <- rank_tbl$table
  }
}
knitr::kable(format_report_table(rank_tbl))
plot_method_ranking(x, palette = "nature")
```

# Consensus

```{r consensus}
if (is.null(x$consensus$result)) x <- compute_consensus(x, strategy = "weighted")
methods_used <- x$consensus$result$methods_used
if (is.null(methods_used)) methods_used <- character()
consensus_meta <- data.frame(
  strategy = if (is.null(x$consensus$result$strategy_used)) NA_character_ else x$consensus$result$strategy_used,
  methods_used = paste(methods_used, collapse = ", "),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
knitr::kable(consensus_meta)
knitr::kable(format_report_table(x$consensus$result$celltype_stability))
plot_disagreement_map(x, palette = "scico")
plot_consensus_confidence(x, palette = "brewer")
```

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
utils::sessionInfo()
```
